continueResume.missingNextAction: Cannot resume: next action is missing; rebuilding execution state.
continueResume.prompt: Resume implementation. Last completed: {lastTool}. Next action: {nextAction}. Do not re-read unchanged files.

stateContextNote.architectureLock: Architecture lock — committed tech stack: {techStack}. Do NOT use other frameworks.
stateContextNote.filesCreated: Files already created (do not recreate, use edit_file):
stateContextNote.alreadyRead: Files already read this task (skip re-reading unless you wrote to them): {files}

toolBlocked.bormagiPath: [BLOCKED] Agent access to .bormagi/ is not permitted. This is internal framework state.
toolBlocked.reread: [BLOCKED] File already read and unchanged this session. Use the content from your earlier read. Write to it first if you need to re-read.
toolBlocked.budgetExhausted: [BUDGET EXHAUSTED] Discovery limit reached for this run. Allowed tools now: write_file, edit_file, declare_file_batch, run_command.
toolBlocked.offBatch: [BATCH VIOLATION] Path not in declared batch. Amend batch first with declare_file_batch, then write files in the declared order.

validatorIssues.missingPackageJson: TypeScript/JavaScript files were written but no package.json exists in the workspace root.
validatorIssues.brokenScriptRef: Script "{script}" references "{file}" which does not exist on disk.
validatorIssues.brokenMainField: package.json "main" field points to "{file}" which does not exist on disk.
